title: trifolium hirsutum var. pictum
intro: Trifolium hirsutum var. pictum, also known as the hairy clover, is a variant of the red clover plant that is characterized by its hairy stems and leaves. The medicinal properties of Trifolium hirsutum var. pictum include its high isoflavone content, which has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce menopausal symptoms, improve cardiovascular health, and support bone health due to its high levels of phytoestrogens. Trifolium hirsutum var. pictum can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or dried flower supplement, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
